title: Integration Interface and Base Classes

classes.name: DDTrace\Integration
methods: public static init(): int
classes.notes: Core contract for all instrumentation integrations; status constants drive lifecycle

classes.name: DDTrace\Integrations\Integration
methods: public static getName(): string — returns static::NAME
public static addTraceAnalyticsIfEnabled(SpanData $span): void
public static requiresExplicitTraceAnalyticsEnabling(): bool — default true; frameworks override to false
public static shouldLoad(string $name): bool — checks ddtrace ext loaded + ddtrace_config_integration_enabled()
public static toString($value): string

public static handleInternalSpanServiceName(SpanData $span, string $fallbackName, bool $skipFlattening=false): void — resolves service name via DD_TRACE_REMOVE_INTEGRATION_SERVICE_NAMES_ENABLED and DD_SERVICE_MAPPING
public static handleOrphan(SpanData $span): void — rejects orphan spans via DD_TRACE_REMOVE_AUTOINSTRUMENTATION_ORPHANS

classes.name: DDTrace\Integrations\HttpClientIntegrationHelper
methods: public static isClientError(int $statusCode): bool — reads DD_TRACE_HTTP_CLIENT_ERROR_STATUSES, supports ranges like '400-499'
public static setClientError(SpanData $span, int $statusCode, ?string $reasonPhrase=null): bool — sets Tag::ERROR_TYPE='http_error', Tag::ERROR_MSG
classes.notes: Shared by Guzzle, Curl, PSR-18 integrations for HTTP error tagging

classes.name: DDTrace\Integrations\DatabaseIntegrationHelper
methods: public static injectDatabaseIntegrationData(HookData $hook, string $backend, int $argNum=0, bool $preventFullMode=false): void — injects DBM SQL comment, respects DD_DBM_PROPAGATION_MODE; full propagation for mysql/pgsql only

public static propagateViaSqlComments($query, $databaseService, $mode, $targetHost, $dbName, $peerService): string — builds ordered SQL comment tags: dddb, dddbs, dde, ddh, ddprs, ddps, ddpv, traceparent
public static injectSqlComment($query, array $tags): string — URL-encodes and prepends /*key='val',...*/ comment
classes.notes: DBM = Database Monitoring propagation. Supports disabled/service/full modes

classes.name: DDTrace\HookData
properties: public mixed $data — arbitrary data passed from begin-hook to end-hook
public mixed $returned — return value (uninitialized in begin hook)
public ?Throwable $exception — thrown exception (uninitialized in begin hook)
public object $instance — object instance if called on object
methods: public span(?SpanStack|SpanData $parent=null): SpanData — creates or returns attached span
public unlimitedSpan(?SpanStack|SpanData $parent=null): SpanData — span regardless of span limit
public overrideArguments(array $arguments): bool — pre-hook only
public overrideReturnValue(mixed $value): bool — post-hook only
public overrideException(?Throwable $exception): bool — post-hook only
public suppressCall(): bool — pre-hook only, prevents function execution
public disableJitInlining(): bool
public allowNestedHook(): bool
public getSourceFile(): string
classes.notes: Passed to install_hook() begin/end closures; primary instrumentation API

classes.name: DDTrace\SpanData
methods: public getDuration(): int — nanoseconds
public getStartTime(): int — nanoseconds
public getLink(): SpanLink
public hexId(): string

key_relationships: DDTrace\Integrations\Integration uses DDTrace\SpanData (parameter type in helpers)

concrete_integration_examples.note: All follow same pattern: const NAME, static init(): int, optional requiresExplicitTraceAnalyticsEnabling()

integration_lifecycle: 1. shouldLoad(NAME) checks ddtrace ext present + config enabled
2. init(): int called — registers trace_method/hook_method/install_hook instrumentation hooks
3. Returns LOADED (success), NOT_AVAILABLE (prerequisite missing), or NOT_LOADED (deferred)
4. Each hooked call creates SpanData via HookData::span()
5. Span fields set (name, resource, service, type, meta tags)
6. Integration helpers (DatabaseIntegrationHelper, HttpClientIntegrationHelper) applied as needed
7. handleOrphan() optionally rejects span if orphan removal enabled
important_notes: DDTrace\Integration (interface, ext C stub) is the root contract. DDTrace\Integrations\Integration (PHP abstract) provides shared static utilities — not lifecycle boilerplate. Concrete integrations use trace_method(), trace_function(), hook_method(), hook_function(), or install_hook() to register closures. Helpers (Database/HttpClient) are standalone utility classes, not part of the inheritance chain. DD_TRACE_ANALYTICS_ENABLED controls top-level framework analytics; requiresExplicitTraceAnalyticsEnabling()=false enables auto-inclusion for frameworks.
